name: undo_redo_app_state
description: Mini-git undo/redo of the whole app-state RefAny via the E2E ops (commit_undo_snapshot / undo_app_state / redo_app_state), backed by RefAnyUndoManager (reversible JSON diffs). PREREQUISITE: the running app's root model must be JSON-serializable via AZ_REFLECT_JSON (the bundled test apps use plain AZ_REFLECT and are NOT serializable). The test is model-light: set_app_state seeds each state, so the model only needs a numeric 'counter' field. Each commit records the diff vs the previous commit; undo/redo walk the history; committing a new state after an undo discards the orphaned redo branch (git-like).
